body: One should be able to mark one ticket as duplicate of another. The usual behaviour is that the marked one is closed after adding a comment and a 'duplicate-of' relation to both. Note that one parent-ticket can thus have multiple closed duplicates, but in a cloud of duplicates, there can only ever be one ticket that wasn't closed due to duplication. It is either still open, rejected or finished.
title: Add 'duplicate ticket' feature
